name: chat-extras
description: Slimmed leftover-bag of chat-side helpers — drafts (server-side input autosave) + input-history (the up-arrow recall stack). Welcome-messages, todos, and pet-console moved to their own modules per registers-doc §4. User-state files stay outside the module dir so a disable-then-enable cycle preserves them; input-history is stored per active user under bridge/users/<email>/input-history.json.
